name: Influence Gaming
description: Built the marketing website for Influence Minecraft, an in-game advertising and creator marketing platform.

projects.name: Influence Minecraft
projects.description: Marketing website for Influence Minecraft, an in-game advertising and creator marketing platform. Implemented from designer specifications using Next.js and Tailwind CSS, featuring case studies, creator showcases, server analytics, and a news/blog section powered by Velite as a file-based CMS.
